section.title: 412+ reviews, 4.8 average.
section.subtitle: A sample of what clients say after choosing Zewarish for milestones, gifts, and everyday pieces.

testimonials.name: Anjali Srivastava
testimonials.quote: The bridal set was matched beautifully to my lehenga, and every certificate was explained before billing.

testimonials.name: Priya Gupta
testimonials.quote: I came in for earrings and left with exactly what suited my budget. No pressure, just good guidance.

testimonials.name: Ritu Chaurasia
testimonials.quote: The engraving and sizing were perfect. The ring felt personal without becoming overdesigned.

testimonials.name: Meera Pandey
testimonials.quote: They helped us select gifts for the whole family and kept everything organised by ceremony.

testimonials.name: Kavita Yadav
testimonials.quote: My old bangles looked new after the polish refresh, and they checked every clasp carefully.

google.summary: Consistently rated for transparent guidance, refined designs, and careful jewellery aftercare.
